history.text: The Ellice Islands became part of a British protectorate.
The Ellice Islands separated from the Gilbert Islands.
Tuvalu joined the United Nations, confirming broad international recognition.

worthSeeing.title: Funafuti Conservation Area:
worthSeeing.text: Pristine atoll lagoon with excellent snorkelling and seabird colonies.

worthSeeing.title: Climate Ground Zero:
worthSeeing.text: Tuvalu is among the first nations facing inundation from rising seas, making it a climate pilgrimage site.

worthSeeing.title: WWII History:
worthSeeing.text: Funafuti served as a major Allied base in the Pacific campaign.

planningQuestions.a: Funafuti Conservation Area, Climate Ground Zero, WWII History.
